speaker: speaker1
text: hi , Mary ! What do you like to do in your spare time ?

speaker: speaker2
text: well , I spend a lot of time watching movies .

speaker: speaker1
text: what a confidence ! I always watch a lot of movies , too .

speaker: speaker2
text: oh really , Frank ? What kind of movies do you like ?

speaker: speaker1
text: actually , I watch whichever movie there is , be it a comedy , a sci-fi or a suspense movie . How about you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: art films are my favorite , but thrillers are cool , too .

speaker: speaker1
text: really impressive . These two genres are totally different .

speaker: speaker2
text: sure . I enjoy both of them very much .

speaker: speaker1
text: how often do you go to the cinema ?

speaker: speaker2
text: once in a while , I suppose , I usually rent movies at Movie Salon .

speaker: speaker2
text: it's a movie rental store in my neighborhood . I've got a membership there .

speaker: speaker2
text: yes , you can find almost all new releases there .

speaker: speaker1
text: really ? Maybe I shall also sign up for its membership .
